subcodes.first_line: O My Name! The letter of the honored Afnán-Áqá, upon him be My glory and loving-kindness, which was addressed unto thee, hath been laid before Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی مکتوب جناب افنان آقا علیه بهائی و عنایتی که باسم شما بود عبد حاضر لدی
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
